title: Sonic The Hedgehog Craft
description: Adds Chaos Emeralds, Eggman, Metal Sonic, Sonic.exe, and Custom Dimensions based on Mobius
body:
Speed through dimensions in the ultimate Sonic-inspired modpack!

Sonic The Hedghog Craft merges the high-speed action of Sonic the Hedgehog with immersive gameplay mechanics, bringing Sonic’s universe to Minecraft in a thrilling way. Race through iconic zones, collect Chaos Emeralds, and master Sonic’s abilities as you explore expansive biomes filled with adventure!

Press B for Boost and Z for Homing Attack by default.

🌀 Sonicraft Integration – Add more modpacks made by the Author enderpreston [https://enderpreston.wixsite.com/sonicraft/downloads](https://enderpreston.wixsite.com/sonicraft/downloads)
![Sonic Running in Green Hill Zone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bt3m6h7H/images/c7e573e0d4908c05a0cad69775d4bfeda23b914e.png)
⚙️ Enhanced Movement – Homing Attack, Boost, No Falling Damage (When wearing sonic's shoes), and StepItUp to ensure smooth traversal

💎 Chaos Emerald Mechanics – Unleash powerful transformations when collecting all seven!
![Chaos Emerald Menu Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bt3m6h7H/images/dceaf97d5cb7780502ed8ba4a13a17ef9e81200d.png)
🌍 Dimensional Expansion – Craft a Golden Ring and Use a Flint and Ring to Explore realms beyond the Green Hill Zone, like The Aether and Blood Gold Ring Zone.
![New Dimensional Portals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bt3m6h7H/images/5213d890e5ecb3bc4c588c816f0636550470ddd8.png)
🎶 Immersive Soundtrack – Custom sound effects and music capture the essence of Sonic.
![Sonic standing in Marble Hills with Springyard Zone Trees Behind](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bt3m6h7H/images/b4df24f1220c6e398fca97372b4692513c92a204.png)
🔧 Optimized Performance – Tweaked configs ensure a seamless, fast-paced experience.

Get Ready to Dash!
Whether you’re speeding through landscapes or battling against familiar foes, Sonic the Hedgehog Craft delivers an exhilarating Sonic-themed adventure in Minecraft. Grab your rings, rev up your spin dash, and let the fun begin!
